title: cystopteris filix-fragilis subsp. alpina
intro: Cystopteris filix-fragilis subsp. alpina, also known as the alpine brittle fern, is a subspecies of the delicate fern plant native to mountainous regions. The alpine brittle fern has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and acting as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of the alpine brittle fern can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its use and efficacy are not extensively scientifically studied and its use should be under the guidance of a medical professional.
